atomicity.message: Docs-only A25 dogfooding finding entry for the audited 7b3f761 gate escape; staged payload is exactly docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md.

evidence: Agent Mail 3551: hash matched sha256:19440d6b2a627ad5801d213eaa79e66e81ef65477257109f12bf919752e24240 with only docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md included.\nAgent Mail 3551: git diff --cached --check passed.\nAgent Mail 3551: go test ./... passed, including burpvalve/cmd/burpvalve.

evidence: Agent Mail 3551: staged diff adds one A25 finding and changes log-discipline next ID from A25 to A26.\nAgent Mail 3551: duplicate-ID awk check printed no duplicate finding IDs.

conditions.message: The entry distinguishes a real gate escape from evidence fabrication and names focused-suite selection as the gap.
evidence: Agent Mail 3552: archive sweep showed 39b5ada PASS, e79595d PASS, 7b3f761 FAIL, cd1b042 FAIL for the prompt-list test.\nAgent Mail 3552: 7b3f761 added prompt-bank/scaffold/template surfaces; cd1b042 was docs-only.\nAgent Mail 3552: 7b3f761 attestation recorded focused internal/backpressure and internal/scaffold tests, not a fabricated full-suite claim.

evidence: Agent Mail 3551: git diff --cached --name-status showed only M docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md.\nAgent Mail 3551: no functions, code paths, or tests changed.

Agent Mail 3552: git diff --cached --name-status returned only M docs/dogfooding-findings-2026-07.md.
Agent Mail 3552: git diff --cached --check passed.

conditions.message: The docs-only finding changes no auth, secret, network, permission, installer, CI credential, or security-boundary behavior.

conditions.message: The staged payload is documentation-only and has no runtime/performance surface.
evidence: Agent Mail 3551: no runtime code, loops, commands, algorithms, package size, CI workload, or hot-path behavior changed.
